scenario_reference.provenance: Frozen NE (rest_trap-v1.json, 3xfree_rider + 1xfirefighter) has team_payoff = 2984.04 PER EPISODE (<= 248.7/step at >= 12 nights), below the 302.87/step random baseline: rest_trap's equilibrium is team-suboptimal by construction (social trap).
